segments.text: This nail polish has a 8 in metal spike.
You might think it's a V8 design, but
it's actually tied to a billion dollar
accident. Most nail polishes have small
round caps, but Christian
Louisboutuitton used heavy glass bottle
with a 8 in pointed handle. It doesn't
fit a makeup bag, but the size is not
random. Why 8 in? Because that's the
exact height of the tallest heel
Louisboutuitton ever made. You're not
holding a nail polish. You're holding
his most extreme shoes. But why is a
shoe designer selling nail polish at
all? Years ago, Louisboutuitton was
working on a shoe prototype. His
assistant was sitting next to him
painting her red nails. He grabbed his
polish and painted the bottom of the
shoes with that polish. That one moment
created the most famous red souls. Now
he sells the exact same thing that
started his empire. For more brand
secrets, subscribe.
